tasks.subject: [agent-centric-ux] [P1] Remove Mesh feature flag from client code
tasks.description:
Remove all client-side Mesh feature flag checks so Mesh UI is always available.

## Files to Modify

### 1. `apps/client/src/layers/entities/mesh/model/use-mesh-config.ts`
Return `true` unconditionally. Keep the function signature so existing imports don't break:
```typescript
/** Mesh is always enabled (feature flag removed in ADR-0062). */
export function useMeshEnabled(): boolean {
  return true;
}
```

### 2. `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/use-feature-enabled.ts`
Remove `'mesh'` from the `Subsystem` union type:
```typescript
type Subsystem = 'pulse' | 'relay';  // 'mesh' removed
```
This file currently has:
```typescript
type Subsystem = 'pulse' | 'relay' | 'mesh';
```

### 3. `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/ui/SessionSidebar.tsx`
- Remove `const meshEnabled = useMeshEnabled()` variable declaration
- Remove `useMeshEnabled` from imports
- Remove any conditional dimming/tooltip logic on the Mesh footer icon that depends on `meshEnabled`
- The Mesh icon button should always open the Mesh panel normally (call `setMeshOpen(true)` unconditionally)

### 4. `apps/client/src/layers/features/mesh/ui/MeshPanel.tsx`
- Remove `useMeshEnabled()` call
- Remove the `FeatureDisabledState` gate component and its import
- Remove the conditional rendering that shows "Enable with DORKOS_MESH_ENABLED=true" message when disabled
- Always render the panel body (Mode A/B pattern for zero vs. existing agents is preserved)

### 5. `apps/client/src/layers/features/mesh/ui/MeshStatsHeader.tsx`
- Remove `useMeshEnabled()` call and its import
- Remove the early `return null` when mesh is disabled
- Always render the stats header content

### 6. `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/ui/ConnectionsTab.tsx`
- Remove `useMeshEnabled()` call and its import
- Always show health data and mesh connections
- Remove any "Enable Mesh" prompt that was conditionally shown

## Test Updates

### `apps/client/src/layers/features/mesh/__tests__/MeshPanel.test.tsx`
- Remove `mockUseMeshEnabled` mock setup
- Remove test cases that verify the disabled/feature-gated state (e.g., "renders disabled state when mesh is not enabled")
- Keep Mode A (zero agents) and Mode B (agents exist) test cases

### `apps/client/src/layers/features/mesh/ui/__tests__/MeshStatsHeader.test.tsx`
- Remove `useMeshEnabled` mock
- Remove the test case that checks for `null` render when disabled

### `apps/client/src/layers/entities/mesh/__tests__/mesh-hooks.test.tsx`
- Remove the `useMeshEnabled` test case (it now just returns `true`)
- Keep all other mesh hook tests

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `useMeshEnabled()` returns `true` unconditionally
- [ ] MeshPanel renders without any feature-disabled gate
- [ ] MeshStatsHeader renders without enabled check
- [ ] SessionSidebar Mesh footer icon is always active (no dimming/disabled state)
- [ ] ConnectionsTab always shows health data
- [ ] All existing mesh UI tests pass (disabled-state tests removed)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] No runtime errors when opening Mesh panel

[agent-centric-ux] [P5] Update keyboard shortcuts docs and AGENTS.md references
tasks.description:
Update project documentation to reflect the new command palette, always-on Mesh, and sidebar changes.

## Files to Modify

### 1. `contributing/keyboard-shortcuts.md`

Add `Cmd+K` / `Ctrl+K` to the Navigation section:
```markdown
| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `Cmd+K` / `Ctrl+K` | Open command palette |
```

This should be added to the existing keyboard shortcuts table in the Navigation section.

### 2. `AGENTS.md`

Three updates needed:

**a) FSD layers table:** Add `features/command-palette/` to the client FSD layers table:
```markdown
| `features/command-palette/` | CommandPaletteDialog, AgentCommandItem, useGlobalPalette, useAgentFrecency, usePaletteItems | Global Cmd+K palette |
```

**b) Mesh description:** Update any references to `DORKOS_MESH_ENABLED` in the server env description. Change the Mesh description to note it's always-on:
- Remove `DORKOS_MESH_ENABLED` from the feature flags section
- Update the mesh-state.ts description to note `isMeshEnabled()` always returns `true`
- Update any text that says Mesh is "feature-flag guarded" to say it's always enabled

**c) Remove DORKOS_MESH_ENABLED references:** Search for and remove/update all mentions of `DORKOS_MESH_ENABLED` throughout AGENTS.md, including:
- The env.ts description mentioning the flag
- The mesh-state.ts description
- The routes/mesh.ts "feature-flag guarded" note
- The config route description

### 3. `.env.example`

Verify `DORKOS_MESH_ENABLED` was removed in task 1.1. If not done there, remove it here.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `Cmd+K` / `Ctrl+K` keyboard shortcut documented in `contributing/keyboard-shortcuts.md`
- [ ] `features/command-palette/` listed in the FSD layers table in AGENTS.md
- [ ] No references to `DORKOS_MESH_ENABLED` remain in AGENTS.md
- [ ] Mesh described as always-on in AGENTS.md
- [ ] mesh-state.ts description updated to note `isMeshEnabled()` always returns true
- [ ] No stale feature flag references remain in documentation
tasks.activeForm: Updating keyboard shortcuts docs and AGENTS.md
